rule.name: Android Cleartext Traffic Enabled
rule.rule_desc: Detects cleartext transport allowances in Android app manifest/network config.
rule.vuln_desc: Cleartext traffic can expose sensitive data to interception.
rule.developer: Disable cleartext traffic and enforce TLS for all endpoints.
rule.reviewer: Review AndroidManifest and network security config for cleartext allowances.

rule.name: Android Backup Allowed
rule.rule_desc: Detects app backup enabled in AndroidManifest.
rule.vuln_desc: Backup-enabled apps may leak sensitive app data via backup channels.
rule.developer: Set allowBackup to false unless explicitly required and risk-assessed.
rule.reviewer: Validate backup policy for apps handling sensitive data.

rule.name: Android Debuggable Build Flag
rule.vuln_desc: Debuggable apps are easier to tamper with and introspect in production.
rule.reviewer: Verify manifest and Gradle build types for release-safe values.

rule.name: Android Exported Component
rule.vuln_desc: Exported components may be invoked by other apps if not permission-protected.
rule.developer: Restrict exports and require permissions where exposure is necessary.
rule.reviewer: Review all exported components for authorization and input validation.

rule.name: Android WebView JavaScript Enabled
rule.vuln_desc: WebView JavaScript with untrusted content can enable script injection paths.
rule.developer: Disable JavaScript unless required and harden content sources.
rule.reviewer: Audit WebView content origins and bridge exposure.

rule.name: Android WebView File URL Universal Access
rule.rule_desc: Detects permissive WebView file URL access settings.
rule.vuln_desc: File URL access can enable local file disclosure and script abuse.
rule.developer: Disable permissive file URL access flags unless strictly needed.
rule.reviewer: Verify WebView file access settings are hardened.

rule.name: Android JavaScript Interface Exposure
rule.rule_desc: Detects JavaScript bridge exposure into WebView.
rule.vuln_desc: Improperly exposed JS interfaces can lead to code execution/data leakage.
rule.developer: Expose minimal interfaces and restrict untrusted content loading.
rule.reviewer: Review annotated bridge methods and content trust boundaries.

rule.name: Android Hardcoded Secret Marker
rule.rule_desc: Detects likely hardcoded secret material in Android code/config.
rule.vuln_desc: Hardcoded secrets can be extracted from source or app package artifacts.
rule.developer: Move secrets to server-side issuance/secure runtime retrieval.
rule.reviewer: Validate no production secrets are embedded in mobile clients.
